purpose: A rule head naming an annotation function nobody registered: reason() raises NameError("name 'annotation' is not defined") — the pinned annotate()'s objmode block only assigns its output variable inside the name-match loop (interpretation.py:1918-1930), so a no-match leaves it unbound. The registration list is empty here; the same raise is what a cleared registry produces (annotation-fn-reset-clears).
provenance: docs/surface.md fn:add_annotation_function (unregistered-name arm, screened); interpretation.py:1914-1931 at the pin; screened live 2026-07-07 (screen_fnedge.py ann-unregistered)
